mapper.update:
UPDATE user_course_relation
progress = #{relation.progress},
learned_seconds = #{relation.learnedSeconds},
status = #{relation.status},
last_learn_time = #{relation.lastLearnTime},
complete_time = #{relation.completeTime},
is_favorite = #{relation.isFavorite},
progress_seconds = #{relation.progressSeconds},
WHERE user_id = #{relation.userId} AND course_id = #{relation.courseId}

UPDATE user_course_relation SET learned_seconds = LEAST(learned_seconds + #{duration}, #{totalSeconds}), progress = LEAST(100, (LEAST(learned_seconds + #{duration}, #{totalSeconds}) * 100) DIV #{totalSeconds}), last_learn_time = #{now}, status = CASE WHEN LEAST(100, (LEAST(learned_seconds + #{duration}, #{totalSeconds}) * 100) DIV #{totalSeconds}) = 100 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId}

UPDATE user_course_relation SET status = 2, progress = 100, complete_time = IFNULL(complete_time, #{now}) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND complete_time IS NULL AND progress >= 100
